steps.title: Match the paired verb
steps.content: The sentence pairs two examples: "lasso" comes from lazo, and "stockade" ______ from estacada. The second verb should match the simple-present form used in the first example.

steps.title: Reject tense shifts
steps.content: A and B shift to future tense without reason. D uses past perfect, which implies completion before another past event and does not match the parallel structure.

steps.title: Preserve the parallel fact
steps.content: Comes keeps both examples in simple present, stating a general fact about word origins. The answer is C.
